channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: Gorillaz Go All-In With Sparks For ‘Happy Dictator’ Performance on ‘Kimmel’: Watch
item.description:
[Intro music fades out]
Host: "Welcome to our music update. We've got some exciting news for fans of edgy, alternative sounds. The British 'cartoon band' Gorillaz has been making waves with their latest collaboration with American duo Sparks. And recently, they brought their unique energy to Jimmy Kimmel Live."
[Short music clip from Gorillaz]
Host: "The performance featured the lead single from their ninth studio album, 'The Mountain', titled 'The Happy Dictator'. But what's interesting is how the band brought their animated world to life on stage. Instead of hiding behind a screen, frontman Damon Albarn took center stage, playing the 'happy dictator' in a bold military-inspired outfit."
[Short music clip from Gorillaz]
Host: "The album itself has been a chart-topper, reaching number one on the U.K. chart and Billboard's Top Rock & Alternative Albums chart. And with a diverse range of collaborators, including Sparks, and songs in five languages, it's no wonder 'The Mountain' is making such an impact."
[Short music clip from Gorillaz]
Host: "Gorillaz is now gearing up for their U.K. and Europe tour, which kicks off in June. They'll be performing at festivals and even headlining a massive show at London's Tottenham Hotspur Stadium. And the best part? Sparks will be joining them as a special guest. If you're a fan, be sure to check out their tour dates and catch them live."
[Outro music starts playing]
Host: "That's all for now. Thanks for tuning in, and we'll catch you on the next update."
[Outro music continues to play until the end]
